name: Luca Wetherall
bio:
Luca is a conductor, singing teacher, pianist and musicologist. He is a Tutor in Music at the University of Oxford and was previously the Headley Trust Scholar at Royal Holloway. He holds a degree in Music from the University of Oxford where he held a choral scholarship at Merton College.

Alongside his work at St Barnabas, he is Director of the Alma Consort and a Choral Director at St John the Baptist Holland Road, and works with multiple other groups on a freelance basis. As a singer he has appeared with numerous professional choirs and opera companies. He teaches singing to choral scholars at Oxford and at Latymer Upper.

His music has received significant attention online and has been heard on BBC Radio 3, Classic FM, and TRE Europe.
